name: medassist-ai
description: MedAssist AI - Full-stack intelligent medical assistant application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/backend && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/backend && npm run test --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.test:watch: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run test:watch --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run test:watch --workspace=packages/frontend"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=packages/backend && npm run test:coverage --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf packages/backend/dist packages/frontend/dist node_modules packages/backend/node_modules packages/frontend/node_modules
